records.title: Fisher Shackelford Dinner
records.honors: Former party chairs Lottie Shackelford and Jimmie Lou Fisher
records.typical_audience: Elected officials, party leaders, donors, activists, county chairs, community leaders
records.historic_significance: Major statewide Democratic fundraiser and gathering where Arkansas candidates and national figures regularly appear.
records.notes: Named dinner began in 2014 per party public materials.

records.title: Clinton Day Dinner
records.typical_audience: Statewide Democratic activists, elected officials, donors — often 300+ attendees
records.historic_significance: Long-running Arkansas Democratic tradition; described as 29th annual in 2025 with 300+ attendees at Henderson State.
records.recurring_pattern: Annual fall dinner in Clark County
records.notes: History dossier available; 2026 calendar date requires official confirmation before publish.

records.title: Independence County Reagan Rockefeller Dinner
records.typical_audience: County GOP activists, elected officials, donors, community leaders
records.historic_significance: County Republican annual dinner — historically draws local and statewide candidates.
records.notes: Feb. 6, 2026 at Batesville Community Center per county committee public schedule.

records.title: Arkansas Democratic Black Caucus — Back to Our Roots After-Party
records.typical_audience: Black Caucus members, party leaders, activists
records.historic_significance: Caucus gathering held in conjunction with Fisher Shackelford Dinner weekend.
records.recurring_pattern: Annual — same weekend as Fisher Shackelford Dinner
records.notes: April 25, 2026 at Little Rock Marriott — after-party to Fisher Shackelford Dinner per party event materials.

records.title: Arkansas Lincoln Day Dinner
records.recurring_pattern: Annual statewide Republican Lincoln Day event
records.notes: Research task — confirm 2026 date and venue from official GOP communications.
